day name: Commemoration of the Appearance of the Sign of the Precious Cross over Jerusalem at the Third Hour of the Day during the Reign of Constance
name: Acacius
troparia: (Tone 8) The sign of the Cross appeared in a dazzling glow, more radiant than the sun.* O Saviour, You stretched it from the holy mountain to the place of Calvary,* manifesting in this way the power You have given to it.* Preserve our civil authorities in strength and establish our country in peace,* through the prayers of the Mother of God.
kontakia: (Tone 4) The pure and life-giving Cross which opened paradise* appeared in splendor over the earth* and extended its dazzling rays to the heavens.* Today, we the faithful accept its radiance* as our guide to the Eternal Light.* We bear it in our struggles as an assurance of victory and triumph.
